name: Peanut Butter Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the margarine and peanut butter with your hands until combined.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, forming small balls.
3. Refrigerate if the mixture is soft.
4. Melt the paraffin and chocolate chips together.
5. Dip each ball into the melted mixture using a toothpick.
6. Place the dipped balls on waxed paper or aluminum foil to dry.
Randy Rigg
